overall.description: First-person exploration through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street at night, transitioning from a neon-lit covered sidewalk into the No-Tell Motel and through its dimly lit interior corridors. The footage showcases the atmospheric, high-fidelity environment of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077 with vibrant pink and green neon reflections on wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with outdoor cafe seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, observing neon signs and outdoor seating areas

entered.detail: overhead concrete awning covering the pedestrian walkway
plastic chairs and tables with red neon lighting underneath awnings
tall digital screen displaying animated advertisements
blue neon sign reading HOTEL on distant building
metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, walking along a covered sidewalk lined with outdoor cafe seating illuminated by pink neon lights. The camera moves steadily forward past digital advertisement kiosks and metal railings, with towering buildings covered in neon signage visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: motel entrance lobby with security gate

events.description: entering the No-Tell Motel from the street through the metal security gate

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the motel lobby, passing through the security gate and observing the interior stairs

entered.detail: building entrance with pink neon NO-TELL MOTEL signage and VACANCY sign
metal accordion security gate partially open
concrete staircase leading to upper floors
illuminated vending machine with colorful display
concrete walls covered in spray paint and graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the outdoor street into the No-Tell Motel, passing through a metal security gate into a lobby bathed in pink neon light. The space features graffiti-covered walls, a concrete staircase to the left, and vending machines, marking a clear shift from the open street to the enclosed interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit motel corridor with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: transitioning from bright neon-lit lobby to darker interior corridors with dim overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: moving deeper into the motel through narrow corridors, passing graffiti-covered walls and dimly lit doorways

entered.detail: long hallway with red carpet and deteriorating walls
worn red carpet covering the corridor floor
walls heavily covered in green and white graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Moving from the lobby into the deeper interior, the lighting drops significantly to dim overhead fixtures illuminating a narrow corridor with red carpet and graffiti-covered walls. The atmosphere becomes more confined and ominous as the camera explores the deteriorating hallway, passing vending machines and doorways leading to unknown rooms.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, rain-slicked cyberpunk street into the claustrophobic and decaying interior of the No-Tell Motel. It begins by gliding along a covered sidewalk past pink neon-lit cafe seating and digital kiosks, with towering neon signage looming in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the open street gives way to a metal security gate that leads into a lobby bathed in pink light, where graffiti-covered walls and concrete stairs signal a shift toward a more enclosed environment. The scene then transitions from the bright lobby into a narrow, dimly lit corridor, where the lighting drops significantly to reveal red carpeting and deteriorating walls. Finally, the atmosphere becomes increasingly ominous as the camera pushes deeper into the confined hallway, passing vending machines and dark doorways.
